plugins.name: designlang
plugins.description: Seven slash commands wrapping the designlang CLI: /extract (full design language → DTCG, Tailwind, Figma), /grade (shareable HTML report card + SVG badge), /battle (head-to-head graded comparison), /remix (restyle in 6 vocabularies — brutalist, swiss, art-deco, cyberpunk, soft-ui, editorial), /pack (one downloadable design-system bundle), /theme-swap (OKLCH-correct recolour around a new brand primary), /brand (full editorial brand-guidelines book — 13 chapters, hand-off-ready).
